title: Road assistance device and related method
abstract: A road assistance device (1) designed to induce the starting of a vehicle in failure induced by a plurality of failures is described, this device (1) consists of: a case (2) designed to contain the device (1); at least one fuel container (3); at least one hydraulic pump (4), arranged inside the fuel container (3), connected through a connection means (5) with at least one injector (6); the injector (6) is equipped with at least one injection means (6a), designed to connect any type of vehicle intake duct, moreover the injector (6) is connected with at least one electrical control unit (7); the electrical control unit (7), equipped with at least one square wave generator (7a) connected to the injector (6) by means of a first electrical connection means (7b), and simultaneously connected to the hydraulic pump (4) by means of a second electrical connection means (7c), and designed to electrically control by means of the square wave generator (7a) the passage and quantity of fuel to be injected into the intake duct, inducing starting and favoring a conduction of the vehicle to a repair point.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS 1) Road assistance device (1) characterized in that it is designed to start at least one faulty vehicle having a plurality of faults, said device (1) being composed of: - a case (2) designed to contain said device (1); - at least one containing means (3), designed to contain fuel; - at least one hydraulic pump (4), arranged inside said containing means (3) connected on its top to a lower end of at least one connecting means (5), and designed to enable a passage of said fuel inside said connecting means (5); - said connecting means (5), connected on its bottom to said hydraulic pump (4) and connected on its top to at least one injector (6); - said injector (6) is equipped with at least one injection means (6a), designed to be connected to any type of suction duct of said faulty vehicle, and moreover said injector (6) is connected at an upper end thereof to said connecting means (5) and at a side end thereof to at least one electric unit (7);- said electric unit (7), equipped with at least one square wave generator (7a) connected to said injector (6) through first electric connection means 

(7b), and simultaneously connected to said hydraulic pump (4) through second electric connection means (7c), and designed to electrically drive through said square wave generator (7a) the passage and the amount of said fuel to be injected inside said suction device, performing a startup and enabling to drive said vehicle to a repair station. 2) Device (1) according to the previous claim, characterized in that said device is portable, and is further equipped with: at least one grip means (2a), physically connected to said case (2) of said device (1) and designed to perform a transport of said device (1) next to said faulty vehicle; - a first potentiometer (7d), physically connected to said electric unit (7), designed to regulate an action of said square wave generator (7a), in particular by modulating the frequency of a square wave generated by said square wave generator (7a), depending on said faulty vehicle; electric power supply means (8), designed to provide electric supply to said electric unit (7) and consequently to said device (1) and to start the faulty vehicle; and at least one recharging element arranged on said 

case (2), designed to perform an electric recharge of said electric power supply means (8). 3) Device (1) according to claim 1, characterized in that said device (1) is integrated inside said vehicle, next to at least one return element, designed to enable an amount of excess fuel to outflow into said containing means (3), ensuring a recirculation of fuel inside said containing means (3) during a period of lack of use of said device (1). 4) Device (1) according to the previous claim, characterized in that said device (1) integrated in the vehicle can be activated by a user in case of failure of said vehicle through at least one activating device, designed to prevent an activation of said device (1) during an attempt of theft of said vehicle, preventing a thieve from starting said vehicle up. 5) Device (1) according to the previous claim, characterized in that said integrated device (1) is equipped with: a second potentiometer, arranged on an accelerator device of said vehicle and physically connected to said electric unit (7), designed to regulate said action of said square wave generator 

(7a), allowing to activate and operate said device (1) should the series potentiometer of said vehicle be faulty; and said injector (6) connected to said suction device of said faulty vehicle through at least one junction element and a first end of said junction element is equipped with a first regulating device, arranged in a normally open status, and connected to a supply circuit as equipment of said faulty vehicle, and simultaneously a second end of said junction element is equipped with a second regulating device, arranged in a normally closed status and connected to said injector (6) of said device (1). 6) Device (1) according to any one of the previous claims, characterized in that said containing means (3) are equipped with: at least one vent valve (3a) arranged on its top; at least one stabilizing means (9) arranged inside said containing means (3), designed to prevent said containing means (3) from overturning, causing the undesired outflow of said fuel; a level sensor designed to detect an amount of fuel present inside said containing means (3), and if said amount is below a fixed threshold, said 

hydraulic pump (4) are not activated. 7) Method for starting a faulty vehicle through said device (1) according to any one of the previous claim, characterized in that it comprises the steps of: a) providing said device (1); b) manually connecting said injection means (6a) to said suction duct of said faulty vehicle; c) activating said electrical control unit (7) and said square wave generator (7a), and sending at least one electric signal, through said first and said second electric connection means (7b), (7c), respectively to said injector (6), and to said hydraulic pump (4); d) inducing said passage of said fuel on said containing means (3), through said connecting means (5) connected to said hydraulic pump (4), to said injector (6); e) performing said passage of said fuel from said injector (6) inside said suction duct of said faulty vehicle, through said injection means (6a) of said injector (6); and f) starting and driving said faulty vehicle to said repair station. 8) Method for starting said faulty vehicle through 

the portable road assistance device (1) according to claims 1, 2 and 6, characterized in that it comprises the steps of: activating said device (1) through an activation of a switch arranged o the device by said user; and performing said steps c) to f) of the method according to the previous claim.
